title_font_status: 'LUXURY' is BAKED from the Canva source (pixel-perfect by construction). The script type word uses Great Vibes (seeded OFL script; closest style match — exact Canva face unconfirmed). Subtitle/labels/website use Poppins (source uses a clean grotesque sans).
_note: #3 (Luxury — Canva page 3 'LUXURY Villa'). STRIP-PLATE REPLICATION: assets/3/source.stripped.svg is the Canva source with ONLY the dynamic text paths removed (engine/stripPlate.ts, empirically measured per-path render positions; intake/3/strip_zones.json). Everything else — the full-background photo, the 'LUXURY' headline, the rounded stat box, the stat icons and dividers — is the ORIGINAL baked Canva artwork, untouched. Editable text draws directly on the intact background (no_knockouts: no boxes possible). Slots sit at the measured positions of the source text they replace: script type word overlapping LUXURY's right end, 3-line centered uppercase subtitle, stat labels centered under their icons, website centered at the bottom. No invented facts: type/stats are real; subtitle derives from real type/city; website is agency copy. Missing facts hide their slot.

text_slots.text:
THIS BRAND-NEW, LUXURY VILLA IS NOW AVAILABLE FOR RENT
AND OFFERS EVERYTHING YOU NEED FOR A STYLISH,
COMFORTABLE, AND CONVENIENT LIFESTYLE.
